modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Page numbers not showing correctly in Word with Endnote.

full_description_text:
- I was working on a document in Word and noticed the page numbers are weird.  
- Instead of showing the actual numbers, they just say { PAGE \* MERGEFORMAT }.  
- This happened after I installed Endnote, and I’m not sure why it’s doing this.
short_description: Page numbers not showing correctly in Word with Endnote.
description:
